topics.topic: Building a Robust Event-Driven Architecture in Laravel
topics.context: decoupling systems to handle high volume background tasks efficiently

topics.topic: Mastering Database Indexing and Query Optimization for Large Datasets
topics.context: improving performance for complex queries hitting multi-million row tables
topics.notes: focusing on composite indexes, analyzing slow queries with EXPLAIN, and when to denormalize

topics.topic: Implementing Idempotency in Payment Webhooks using Redis
topics.context: preventing duplicate processing of critical external events like Stripe or PayPal webhooks
topics.notes: using Redis locks and idempotency keys to ensure exactly-once processing

topics.topic: Seamless Zero-Downtime Deployments with Laravel Envoy and CI/CD
topics.context: automating deployment processes without dropping a single user request
topics.notes: symlink-based deployment strategies, database migration safety, and CI/CD pipeline integration

topics.topic: Demystifying Node.js Event Loop for Backend Engineers
topics.context: understanding how Node.js handles concurrency under the hood to write better code
topics.notes: deep dive into libuv, phases of the event loop, and avoiding event loop blocking

topics.topic: Effective Background Job Processing: Avoiding the 'Queue Full' Nightmare
topics.context: scaling job workers and handling failures gracefully under heavy load
topics.notes: job rate limiting, exponential backoff, dead-letter queues, and monitoring

topics.notes: using Redis Pub/Sub for cross-node broadcasting, optimizing memory usage, and load balancing
